basic_details.job_title: NHSRCL – JGM, Senior Manager and More – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Various Managerial. Candidates with B.E./ B.Tech, MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 16-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NHSRCL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical / Mechanical/ Electronics Engineering or equivalent, Graduation in any discipline with full time master’s degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Corporate Communications, Visual communication, Marketing communication, Advertising or MBA in relevant stream

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JGM, Senior Manager and More Posts
